name: Car Group Limited
analysis: CAR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$27.7300, stop A$25.5618, target A$30.9116 (1.47:1) — then trail it.
